title: Organization
description: Vendor organization metadata for the AI Registry

id.description: Unique identifier for the organization (lowercase, alphanumeric, hyphens)

inferred.description: True if this organization was pre-seeded from an official public source rather than participating directly in the registry. The website marks inferred organizations with a distinct "Inferred" badge and dashed-border treatment. Defaults to false when omitted.

tools.description: Tools this organization provides. Omit if the organization does not provide tools.

skillInstallUrlPrefix.description: URL prefix for auto-generating skill install URLs. The artifact skillId is appended literally.

mcpInstallUrlPrefix.description: URL prefix for auto-generating MCP server install URLs. The artifact serverId is appended literally.
